altText: A tall shagbark hickory tree with shaggy bark and a big green crown.
Looking up the trunk of a hickory tree into its leafy branches.
A tall hickory tree with bare branches and shaggy bark in winter.
Shaggy hickory bark peeling off the trunk in long strips.
A hickory tree trunk covered in rough strips of peeling bark.
Green hickory leaves with five leaflets in a row.
Hickory leaves with five leaflets seen against the blue sky.
Sunny green hickory leaves high up in the tree.
